description: Carol joins late and adds a new pre-sync event on top of the deployment planning already agreed upon by Alice and Bob.

events.title: Deployment Planning
events.reasoning: Alice and Bob agree on Tuesday at 3 PM for 1 hour. Carol joins late and is included in the invite.

events.title: Pre-Deployment Sync
events.reasoning: Carol proposes a pre-deployment sync with Alice the morning before (Tuesday at 9 AM) for 30 minutes. Alice agrees. Bob asks to join but Carol clarifies it is only Alice and Carol.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 2 events on Tuesday: pre-deployment sync at 9 AM (Alice and Carol only) and deployment planning at 3 PM (all three).

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Tuesday=Feb 24. Bob is excluded from the pre-sync explicitly by Carol.
